students_intro.purpose: Introductory tables for database/table mental model and earliest SELECT practice

products_catalog.purpose: Single-table product queries for SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT

customers_cleanup.purpose: Text matching, list/range filters, status filtering, and NULL cleanup practice

sales_kpi.purpose: Expressions, aggregates, grouped reports, and KPI-style analysis

school_relations_intro.purpose: Relational querying, joins, aliases, and beginner subqueries

inventory_ops.purpose: Sandboxed INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE practice

ddl_blank.purpose: Blank schema sandbox for CREATE TABLE and constraint practice

capstone_sandbox.purpose: Final SQL project schema, seed data, and query portfolio
